dashboardForYourExpenses: A dashboard for your expenses. Easy to see, easy to control.
accessYourAccountAndContinue: Access your account and continue your journey with us
validationPasswordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
recurringWithRemindersAndForecast: Register subscriptions, rent and fixed expenses with reminders and cost forecast.
organizeByCategoryCustom: Organize by food, transport, leisure and create custom categories.
totalSpentComparisonAndTrends: View total spent, comparison with previous months and trends.
limitsPerCategoryTrackRemaining: Set limits per category and track how much you can still spend.
alertsNearLimitOrRecurringDue: Alerts when you approach the limit or a recurring expense is due.
recordExpensesAmountCategoryDateFast: Record daily expenses with amount, category and date in seconds.
fixedExpenseDueAvoidSurprises: See when each fixed expense is due and avoid end-of-month surprises.
balanceAndFlowsInOnePlace: Available balance, total income and expenses for the month in one place.
aboutSubtitle: A dashboard for your expenses. Track recurring bills, see what's paid, and stay in control.
aboutRecurringDescription: Subscriptions, rent, and fixed bills in one place with reminders and cost forecast.
aboutPaidTrackingDescription: Mark bills as paid and see at a glance what's due. No double payments, no surprises.
aboutControlDescription: Monthly summary, category limits, and due date forecast so you plan with confidence.
